title: White House Correspondents' Dinner rescheduled after shooting
shortDescription: The White House Correspondents' Association announced it will host a rescheduled dinner after a gunman opened fire at the annual gala in April.

title: Allegheny men shot at 2024 Trump rally in PA sue US for negligence
shortDescription: Two Allegheny men who were shot at the 2024 Trump rally in Butler County allege negligence led to their injuries.

title: AIDS activists disrupt congressional testimony of OMB director Russell Vought
shortDescription: Protesters interrupted Office of Management and Budget (OMB) Director Russell Vought as he testified before the House Budget Committee on Wednesday, April 15, during a hearing on Trump’s 2027 budget request.

title: Trump settlement with IRS could unravel as judge demands answers
shortDescription: Last Friday, a federal judge in Miami demanded answers in Trump’s case against the IRS at the behest of dozens of retired judges who alleged fraud.

title: Texas Republicans, Democrats disagree sharply on voter fraud
shortDescription: A new Texas Southern University poll finds Texans split 50-50 on voter fraud vs. ballot access priorities, with the divide falling along party lines.

title: Rubio says Iran war is over. Trump clashes with Netanyahu. Live updates
shortDescription: Fighting in Lebanon threatened to disrupt peace talks with Iran, and led to a clash between President Trump and Israel's Netanyahu.

title: Trump taps Bill Pulte to replace Tulsi Gabbard as acting DNI
shortDescription: President Trump named Bill Pulte, director of the Federal Housing Finance Agency, as his new acting director of national intelligence.

title: Trump’s Anti-Weaponization Fund faced mounting political challenges | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Rare critiques from Republican lawmakers added to two legal challenges to doom Trump’s $1.8B settlement with the IRS in establishing the fund.

title: Texas Republicans can't move past Paxton impeachment in Senate race
shortDescription: 60 Republicans voted to impeach Ken Paxton in 2023. Now, as he runs for U.S. Senate, their split over whether to back him could reshape Texas politics.

title: Los Angeles mayor election results: Latest on the June 2 primary
shortDescription: If no candidates receives a majority of votes, the two top candidates will move on to an election in November.

title: Daily Briefing: Primaries everywhere today
shortDescription: Plus: FIFA World Cup rosters. Here is the news to know on Tuesday.

title: Trump’s Anti-Weaponization Fund faced mounting political challenges
shortDescription: Rare critiques from Republican lawmakers added to two legal challenges to create a political and legal storm around Trump’s $1.8B IRS settlement.

title: June 2 primary elections are here. See when polls open, close
shortDescription: Voters in six states, including California, are casting their ballots in primary elections on June 2.

title: Trump administration to stop work on 'anti-weaponization' fund
shortDescription: The Justice Department said it "will abide" by a federal judge's temporary order blocking the creation of Trump's $1.8 billion anti-weaponization fund.

title: Iowa GOP governor race takes negative turn ahead of June 2 primary
shortDescription: Iowa’s GOP governor candidates are making their final pitches to voters as they hope to lock in support ahead of Tuesday’s primary elections.

title: Beyond Comey, Trump administration takes on DC group over '8647'
shortDescription: The ACLU of DC alleged the incident was retaliatory, but the government characterized it as a security issue amid a "heightened threat environment."

title: Election-denying Colorado clerk Tina Peters released from prison
shortDescription: Former clerk Tina Peters was released from prison early after Governor Jared Polis commuted her nine-year sentence.

title: Is the Great American State Fair happening? What to know as Trump steps in
shortDescription: After several artists pulled out of the Great American State Fair over the weekend, President Trump said the show would have a new headliner: himself.

title: Trump on Iran peace talks: 'If they're over, they're over'
shortDescription: President Trump downplayed the potential collapse of peace talks with Iran, telling CNBC the negotiations "started to get very boring."
